revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 15 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 15 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月15日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天保]]11年（[[1840年]]_月_日） - [[清]]の[[道光帝]]が[[阿片]]の貿易・販売・吸飲を禁止。イギリスとの[[阿片戦争]]の原因に * [[天保]]12年（[[1841年]]_月_日） - [[江戸幕府]]が老中・[[水野忠邦]]の主導で[[天保の改革]]に着手 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - 上野・[[寛永寺]]に立て籠った[[彰義隊]]が[[官軍]]の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]3年（[[1251年]][[6月5日]]） - [[北条時宗]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代執権（+ [[1284年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元和]]元年（[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月14日 (旧暦)|5月14日]] 翌日[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]] - 前月[[4月15日 (旧暦)|4月15日]] 翌月[[6月15日 (旧暦)|6月15日]] *新暦[[5月15日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月14日 (旧暦)|5月14日]] 翌日[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]] - 前月[[4月15日 (旧暦)|4月15日]] 翌月[[6月15日 (旧暦)|6月15日]] *新暦[[5月15日]]

== できごと == <!-- [[阿片戦争]]の記述と相違 * [[道光]]20年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[6月14日]]） - [[清]]の[[道光帝]]が[[阿片]]の貿易・販売・吸飲を禁止。イギリスとの[[阿片戦争]]の原因に。 --> * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[7月3日]]） - [[天保の改革]]: 将軍・[[徳川家慶]]が、[[享保の改革|享保]]・[[寛政の改革]]にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[水野忠邦]]が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[6月22日]]） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月4日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]: [[上野戦争]]。上野・[[寛永寺]]に立て籠った[[彰義隊]]が[[官軍]]の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1251年]][[6月5日]]） - [[北条時宗]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[執権]]（+ [[1284年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]）

== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1251年]][[6月5日]]） - [[北条時宗]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[執権]]（+ [[1284年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月25日]]） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]]、[[実業家]]、[[島津製作所]]の創業者（+ [[1894年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[6月24日]]） - [[馬場辰猪]]、[[自由民権運動]]の思想家（+ [[1888年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1251年]][[6月5日]]） - [[北条時宗]]{{要出典|date=2021-04}}、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[執権]]（+ [[1284年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月25日]]） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]]、[[実業家]]、[[島津製作所]]の創業者（+ [[1894年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[6月24日]]） - [[馬場辰猪]]、[[自由民権運動]]の思想家（+ [[1888年]]）

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月15日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[元弘]]3年/[[正慶]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1333年]][[6月27日]]） - [[分倍河原の戦い (鎌倉時代)|分倍河原の戦い]]（～[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]]） <!-- [[阿片戦争]]の記述と相違 * [[道光]]20年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[6月14日]]） - [[清]]の[[道光帝]]が[[阿片]]の貿易・販売・吸飲を禁止。イギリスとの[[阿片戦争]]の原因に。 --> * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[7月3日]]） - [[天保の改革]]: 将軍・[[徳川家慶]]が、[[享保の改革|享保]]・[[寛政の改革]]にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[水野忠邦]]が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[6月22日]]） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月4日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]: [[上野戦争]]。上野・[[寛永寺]]に立て籠った[[彰義隊]]が[[官軍]]の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1251年]][[6月5日]]） - [[北条時宗]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[執権]]（+ [[1284年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月25日]]） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]]、[[実業家]]、[[島津製作所]]の創業者（+ [[1894年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[6月24日]]） - [[馬場辰猪]]、[[自由民権運動]]の思想家（+ [[1888年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}

== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[zh:五月十五]] [[en:draft:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[元弘]]3年/[[正慶]]2年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1333]][[6月27日]]） - [[分倍河原の戦い (鎌倉時代)|分倍河原の戦い]]（～[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]]）
* [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841]][[7月3日]]） - [[天保の改革]]: 将軍・[[徳川家慶]]が、[[享保の改革|享保]]・[[寛政の改革]]にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[水野忠邦]]が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * [[文久]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1861]][[6月22日]]） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月4日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]: [[上野戦争]]。上野・[[寛永寺]]に立て籠った[[彰義隊]]が[[官軍]]の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[建長]]3年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1251]][[6月5日]]） - [[北条時宗]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[執権]]（+ [[1284]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839]][[6月25日]]） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]]、[[実業家]]、[[島津製作所]]の創業者（+ [[1894]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850]][[6月24日]]） - [[馬場辰猪]]、[[自由民権運動]]の思想家（+ [[1888]]）
== Deaths == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1615]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}

[[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[zh:五月十五]] [[en:draft:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 15 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[zh:五月十五]] [[en:draft:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:null category]][[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]][[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]][[sn:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[zh:五月十五]] [[en:draft:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.

== Deaths == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1615]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575]]） * [[天保]]13rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1842]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770]]）

== Births == * [[建長]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]] 8代[[執権]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[実業家]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] の思想家（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[商人]] ・[[随筆家]] （* [[1770]] ）

[[sn:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[zh:五月十五]] [[en:draft:May 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[元弘]] 3年/[[Shōkyō]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[6月27日]] ） - [[分倍河原の戦い (鎌倉時代)|分倍河原の戦い]] （～[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]] ）
* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[7月3日]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[水野忠邦]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[6月22日]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[7月4日]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[建長]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]] 8代[[執権]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[6月25日]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[実業家]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[6月24日]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] の思想家（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[6月11日]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[6月23日]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[商人]] ・[[随筆家]] （* [[1770]] ）

* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[水野忠邦]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。

* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[水野忠邦]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。

* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[Mizuno Tadakuni]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 8代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[Businessperson]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] のThinker（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genna]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[商人]] ・[[Essayist]] （* [[1770]] ）

* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[Mizuno Tadakuni]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 8代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[Businessperson]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] のThinker（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genna]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[商人]] ・[[Essayist]] （* [[1770]] ）

== Events == * [[元弘]] 3rd year /[[Shōkyō]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 27]] ） - [[分倍河原の戦い (鎌倉時代)|分倍河原の戦い]] （～[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]] ）
* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[Mizuno Tadakuni]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 8代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[Businessperson]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] のThinker（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genna]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[Merchant]] ・[[Essayist]] （* [[1770]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[zh:五月十五]] [[en:draft:May 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[元弘]] 3rd year /[[Shōkyō]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 27]] ） - [[分倍河原の戦い (鎌倉時代)|分倍河原の戦い]] （～[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]] ）
* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[Mizuno Tadakuni]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 8代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[Businessperson]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] のThinker（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genna]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[Merchant]] ・[[Essayist]] （* [[1770]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 8代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[Businessperson]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] のThinker（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genna]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[Merchant]] ・[[Essayist]] （* [[1770]] ）

* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[Mizuno Tadakuni]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 8代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[Businessperson]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] のThinker（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genna]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[Merchant]] ・[[Essayist]] （* [[1770]] ）

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[元弘]] 3rd year /[[Shōkyō]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 27]] ） - [[分倍河原の戦い (鎌倉時代)|分倍河原の戦い]] （～[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]] ）
* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[July 3]] ） - [[天保の改革]] : 将軍・[[徳川家慶]] が、[[享保の改革|享保]] ・[[Kanseiの改革]] にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[Mizuno Tadakuni]] が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[June 22]] ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 4]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] : [[上野戦争]] 。上野・[[寛永寺]] に立て籠った[[彰義隊]] が[[官軍]] の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1251]] [[June 5]] ） - [[北条時宗]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 8代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1284]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 25]] ） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]] 、[[Businessperson]] 、[[島津製作所]] の創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[June 24]] ） - [[馬場辰猪]] 、[[自由民権運動]] のThinker（+ [[1888]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genna]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1615]] [[June 11]] ） - [[長宗我部盛親]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1575]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 23]] ） - [[鈴木牧之]] 、[[Merchant]] ・[[Essayist]] （* [[1770]] ）

* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|de|1841|ja|1841|zh|1841}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}} ） - {{ill|天保の改革|de|天保の改革|ja|天保の改革|zh|天保の改革}} : 将軍・{{ill|徳川家慶|de|徳川家慶|ja|徳川家慶|zh|徳川家慶}} が、{{ill|享保の改革|de|享保の改革|ja|享保の改革|zh|享保の改革|lt=享保|lt_de=享保|lt_ja=享保|lt_zh=享保}} ・{{ill|Kanseiの改革|de|Kanseiの改革|ja|Kanseiの改革|zh|Kanseiの改革}} にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・{{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|de|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|Mizuno Tadakuni|zh|Mizuno Tadakuni}} が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。
* {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|de|1861|ja|1861|zh|1861}} {{ill|June 22|de|June 22|ja|June 22|zh|June 22}} ） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊.
* {{ill|Meiji era|de|Meiji era|ja|Meiji era|zh|Meiji era|lt=Meiji|lt_de=Meiji|lt_ja=Meiji|lt_zh=Meiji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|de|1868|ja|1868|zh|1868}} {{ill|July 4|de|July 4|ja|July 4|zh|July 4}} ） - {{ill|戊辰戦争|de|戊辰戦争|ja|戊辰戦争|zh|戊辰戦争}} : {{ill|上野戦争|de|上野戦争|ja|上野戦争|zh|上野戦争}} 。上野・{{ill|寛永寺|de|寛永寺|ja|寛永寺|zh|寛永寺}} に立て籠った{{ill|彰義隊|de|彰義隊|ja|彰義隊|zh|彰義隊}} が{{ill|官軍|de|官軍|ja|官軍|zh|官軍}} の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|de|Kenchō|ja|Kenchō|zh|Kenchō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|Julian calendar|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1251|de|1251|ja|1251|zh|1251}} {{ill|June 5|de|June 5|ja|June 5|zh|June 5}} ） - {{ill|北条時宗|de|北条時宗|ja|北条時宗|zh|北条時宗}} <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] {{ill|Encyclopedia Britannica|de|Encyclopedia Britannica|ja|Encyclopedia Britannica|zh|Encyclopedia Britannica|lt=Encyclopædia Britannica|lt_de=Encyclopædia Britannica|lt_ja=Encyclopædia Britannica|lt_zh=Encyclopædia Britannica}}</ref>、{{ill|Kamakura shogunate|de|Kamakura shogunate|ja|Kamakura shogunate|zh|Kamakura shogunate}} 8代{{ill|Shikken|de|Shikken|ja|Shikken|zh|Shikken}} （+ {{ill|1284|de|1284|ja|1284|zh|1284}} ）
* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|de|1839|ja|1839|zh|1839}} {{ill|June 25|de|June 25|ja|June 25|zh|June 25}} ） - {{ill|島津源蔵 (初代)|de|島津源蔵 (初代)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|zh|島津源蔵 (初代)}} 、{{ill|Businessperson|de|Businessperson|ja|Businessperson|zh|Businessperson}} 、{{ill|島津製作所|de|島津製作所|ja|島津製作所|zh|島津製作所}} の創業者（+ {{ill|1894|de|1894|ja|1894|zh|1894}} ）
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|de|1850|ja|1850|zh|1850}} {{ill|June 24|de|June 24|ja|June 24|zh|June 24}} ） - {{ill|馬場辰猪|de|馬場辰猪|ja|馬場辰猪|zh|馬場辰猪}} 、{{ill|自由民権運動|de|自由民権運動|ja|自由民権運動|zh|自由民権運動}} のThinker（+ {{ill|1888|de|1888|ja|1888|zh|1888}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genna|de|Genna|ja|Genna|zh|Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|de|1615|ja|1615|zh|1615}} {{ill|June 11|de|June 11|ja|June 11|zh|June 11}} ） - {{ill|長宗我部盛親|de|長宗我部盛親|ja|長宗我部盛親|zh|長宗我部盛親}} 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1575|de|1575|ja|1575|zh|1575}} ）
* {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|de|1842|ja|1842|zh|1842}} {{ill|June 23|de|June 23|ja|June 23|zh|June 23}} ） - {{ill|鈴木牧之|de|鈴木牧之|ja|鈴木牧之|zh|鈴木牧之}} 、{{ill|Merchant|de|Merchant|ja|Merchant|zh|Merchant}} ・{{ill|Essayist|de|Essayist|ja|Essayist|zh|Essayist}} （* {{ill|1770|de|1770|ja|1770|zh|1770}} ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd year / {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日}}), forces under the command of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|ja|徳川家慶}} approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|水野忠邦}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1861]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|ja|寛永寺}}, were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1251]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, the 8th regent ({{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}}) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1284]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)}}, a businessperson and founder of {{ill|Shimazu Corporation|ja|島津製作所}} (died [[1894]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1850]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Baba Tatsuchō|ja|馬場辰猪}}, a political thinker (died [[1888]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日}}) – {{ill|Sanada Nobushige|ja|真田信繁}}, also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1842]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[1770]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd year / {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日}}), forces under the command of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|ja|徳川家慶}} approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|水野忠邦}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1861]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|ja|寛永寺}}, were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1251]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, the 8th regent ({{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}}) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1284]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)}}, a businessperson and founder of {{ill|Shimazu Corporation|ja|島津製作所}} (died [[1894]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1850]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Baba Tatsuchō|ja|馬場辰猪}}, a political thinker (died [[1888]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日}}) – {{ill|Sanada Nobushige|ja|真田信繁}}, also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1842]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[1770]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year / {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}}) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=draft}}), forces under the command of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1841]] {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft}}) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|ja|徳川家慶|12=draft}} approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|水野忠邦|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1861]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|ja|寛永寺|12=draft}}, were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1251]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗|12=draft}}, the 8th regent ({{ill|Shikken|ja|執権|12=draft}}) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1284]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=draft}}, a businessperson and founder of {{ill|Shimazu Corporation|ja|島津製作所|12=draft}} (died [[1894]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1850]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Baba Tatsuchō|ja|馬場辰猪|12=draft}}, a political thinker (died [[1888]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sanada Nobushige|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}}, also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1842]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=draft}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[1770]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd year / {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}}) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=draft}}), forces under the command of [[Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1841]] {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft}}) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|ja|徳川家慶|12=draft}} approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|ja|水野忠邦|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1861]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|ja|寛永寺|12=draft}}, were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1251]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗|12=draft}}, the 8th regent ({{ill|Shikken|ja|執権|12=draft}}) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1284]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=draft}}, a businessperson and founder of {{ill|Shimazu Corporation|ja|島津製作所|12=draft}} (died [[1894]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1850]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Baba Tatsuchō|ja|馬場辰猪|12=draft}}, a political thinker (died [[1888]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1615]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sanada Nobushige|ja|真田信繁|12=draft}}, also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[1567]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1842]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=draft}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[1770]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 15 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] }} [[sn:May 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月十五]] [[en:draft:May 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:May 15日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ay 15 (Lunisolar)]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月15日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[元弘]]3年/[[正慶]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1333年]][[6月27日]]） - [[分倍河原の戦い (鎌倉時代)|分倍河原の戦い]]（～[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]]） <!-- [[阿片戦争]]の記述と相違 * [[道光]]20年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1840年]][[6月14日]]） - [[清]]の[[道光帝]]が[[阿片]]の貿易・販売・吸飲を禁止。イギリスとの[[阿片戦争]]の原因に。 --> * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[7月3日]]） - [[天保の改革]]: 将軍・[[徳川家慶]]が、[[享保の改革|享保]]・[[寛政の改革]]にならった幕政改革を上意し、老中・[[水野忠邦]]が綱紀粛正と奢侈禁止を命じる。 * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[6月22日]]） - イギリス人H・W・ハンサードが長崎で日本初の英字新聞「The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser」を発刊。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月4日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]: [[上野戦争]]。上野・[[寛永寺]]に立て籠った[[彰義隊]]が[[官軍]]の総攻撃により敗走。新政府が江戸を掌握。
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1251年]][[6月5日]]） - [[北条時宗]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Hojo-Tokimune Hōjō Tokimune Japanese regent] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[執権]]（+ [[1284年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月25日]]） - [[島津源蔵 (初代)]]、[[実業家]]、[[島津製作所]]の創業者（+ [[1894年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[6月24日]]） - [[馬場辰猪]]、[[自由民権運動]]の思想家（+ [[1888年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515}}

== 忌日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1615年]][[6月11日]]） - [[長宗我部盛親]]、[[武将]]（* [[1575年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月23日]]） - [[鈴木牧之]]、[[商人]]・[[随筆家]]（* [[1770年]]）

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839538]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|qq=|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|qq=|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]
{{translated page|ja|5月15日 (旧暦)|version=97894763|comment=Imported full ja history}}

}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_yue" to "zh-yue"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839538]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|qq=|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|qq=|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]
{{translated page|ja|5月15日 (旧暦)|version=97894763|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 15 of Japanese Lunar months]]
}}

[[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月十五]]
[[ar:May 15 (Lunisolar)]]

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] {{wikidata link|Q839538}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839538]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]
{{translated page|ja|5月15日 (旧暦)|version=97894763|comment=Imported full ja history}}

}}

[[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月十五]]

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]] {{wikidata link|Q839538}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839538]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]
{{translated page|ja|5月15日 (旧暦)|version=97894763|comment=Imported full ja history}}
