revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839538]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十五]]
{{translated page|ja|5月15日 (旧暦)|version=97894763|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_yue" to "zh-yue"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839538]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year / [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|足利尊氏]] (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]]) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Ieyoshi]] approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor [[:en:Mizuno Tadakuni|Mizuno Tadakuni]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at [[:en:Kan'ei-ji|Kan'ei-ji]], were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1251|1251]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]], the 8th regent ([[:en:Shikken|Shikken]]) of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1284|1284]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of [[:en:Shimadzu|Shimazu Corporation]] (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Baba Tatsui|Baba Tatsuchō]], a political thinker (died [[:en:1888|1888]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Sanada Yukimura|Sanada Nobushige]], also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born [[:en:1770|1770]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|5月15日 (旧暦)|version=97894763|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 5월 15일]] [[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月十五]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839538]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year / {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=足利尊氏}} (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3}}) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|en|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|WD=Q439675|lt=Tokugawa Ieyoshi}} approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|WD=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|en|Kan'ei-ji|WD=Q3120766|lt=Kan'ei-ji}}, were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenchō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1251|en|1251|WD=Q5494|lt=1251}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|en|Hōjō Tokimune|WD=Q430964|lt=Hōjō Tokimune}}, the 8th regent ({{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|WD=Q1045904|lt=Shikken}}) of the Kamakura shogunate (died {{ill|1284|en|1284|WD=Q5544|lt=1284}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of {{ill|Shimadzu|en|Shimadzu|WD=Q517117|lt=Shimazu Corporation}} (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}}) – {{ill|Baba Tatsui|en|Baba Tatsui|WD=Q11667928|lt=Baba Tatsuchō}}, a political thinker (died {{ill|1888|en|1888|WD=Q7829|lt=1888}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Nobushige}}, also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born {{ill|1770|en|1770|WD=Q7683|lt=1770}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year / {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=足利尊氏}} (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3}}) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|en|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|WD=Q439675|lt=Tokugawa Ieyoshi}} approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|WD=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|en|Kan'ei-ji|WD=Q3120766|lt=Kan'ei-ji}}, were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenchō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1251|en|1251|WD=Q5494|lt=1251}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|en|Hōjō Tokimune|WD=Q430964|lt=Hōjō Tokimune}}, the 8th regent ({{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|WD=Q1045904|lt=Shikken}}) of the Kamakura shogunate (died {{ill|1284|en|1284|WD=Q5544|lt=1284}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of {{ill|Shimadzu|en|Shimadzu|WD=Q517117|lt=Shimazu Corporation}} (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}}) – {{ill|Baba Tatsui|en|Baba Tatsui|WD=Q11667928|lt=Baba Tatsuchō}}, a political thinker (died {{ill|1888|en|1888|WD=Q7829|lt=1888}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Nobushige}}, also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born {{ill|1770|en|1770|WD=Q7683|lt=1770}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|14|5|16|4|15|6|5|0515|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十五]][[zh:五月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 15|qq=May 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3rd year / {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27|1=June 27}}) – In the 【Bunbae River Battle (分倍河原の戦い)】 (– approximately until {{ill|May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (Lunisolar)|lt=May 16 (old lunar calendar)|ja|5月16日 (旧暦)|lt=5月16日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 16 (old lunar calendar)|qq=}}), forces under the command of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=足利尊氏|1=Ashikaga Takauji}} (who later turned to overthrow the bakufu) secured victory. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3|1=July 3}}) – In the 【Tenpō Reforms (天保の改革)】: Shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|en|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|WD=Q439675|lt=Tokugawa Ieyoshi|1=Tokugawa Ieyoshi}} approved reforms modeled on those of the 【Kyōhō Reforms (享保の改革)】 and 【Kansei Reforms (寛政の改革)}, ordering strict discipline and a ban on extravagance, enforced by the senior councilor {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|WD=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni|1=Mizuno Tadakuni}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – The British H. W. Hansard published Japan’s first English-language newspaper, “The Nagasaki Shippinglist and Advertiser,” in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}}) – During the Boshin War (戊辰戦争), hostilities occurred at Ueno (【Ueno Sensō|上野戦争】): defenders in Ueno, holed up at {{ill|Kan'ei-ji|en|Kan'ei-ji|WD=Q3120766|lt=Kan'ei-ji|1=Kan'ei-ji}}, were overwhelmed by the imperial forces, leading to the new government’s takeover of Edo. == Births == * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenchō|1=Kenryaku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1251|en|1251|WD=Q5494|lt=1251|1=1251}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5|1=June 5}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|en|Hōjō Tokimune|WD=Q430964|lt=Hōjō Tokimune|1=Hōjō Tokimune}}, the 8th regent ({{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|WD=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}}) of the Kamakura shogunate (died {{ill|1284|en|1284|WD=Q5544|lt=1284|1=1284}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25|1=June 25}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|ja|島津源蔵 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Genzō (1st generation)|1=Genzō Shimazu I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11476816}}, a businessperson and founder of {{ill|Shimadzu|en|Shimadzu|WD=Q517117|lt=Shimazu Corporation|1=Shimadzu}} (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24|1=June 24}}) – {{ill|Baba Tatsui|en|Baba Tatsui|WD=Q11667928|lt=Baba Tatsuchō|1=Baba Tatsui}}, a political thinker (died {{ill|1888|en|1888|WD=Q7829|lt=1888|1=1888}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}}) – {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|WD=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Nobushige|1=Sanada Yukimura}}, also known as Yukimura, a military commander (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842|1=1842}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23|1=June 23}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Makino|ja|鈴木牧之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Makino|1=Suzuki Bokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649058}}, a merchant and essayist (born {{ill|1770|en|1770|WD=Q7683|lt=1770|1=1770}}).
== Commemorations ==
